annotations.description:
Prometheus has not been reachable for the past 5 minutes.
This may indicate that the Prometheus server is down, unreachable due to network issues, or experiencing a crash loop.
Check the status of the Prometheus pods, service endpoints, and network connectivity.
annotations.info:
Prometheus has not been reachable for the past 5 minutes.
This may indicate that the Prometheus server is down, unreachable due to network issues, or experiencing a crash loop.
Check the status of the Prometheus pods, service endpoints, and network connectivity.
annotations.summary: Prometheus is unreachable for 5 minutes.
annotations.title: Prometheus is unreachable for 5 minutes.

rules.expression: group by (cluster) (up{job="kube-state-metrics"}) unless on(cluster) group by (cluster) (up{job="prometheus/prometheus",namespace="prometheus"} == 1)

annotations.description:
Prometheus has been unreachable for more than 5% of the time over the past 24 hours.
This may indicate that the Prometheus server is down, experiencing network issues, or stuck in a crash loop.
Please check the status of the Prometheus pods, service endpoints, and network connectivity.
annotations.info:
Prometheus has been unreachable for more than 5% of the time over the past 24 hours.
This may indicate that the Prometheus server is down, experiencing network issues, or stuck in a crash loop.
Please check the status of the Prometheus pods, service endpoints, and network connectivity.
annotations.summary: Prometheus is unreachable for 1 day.
annotations.title: Prometheus is unreachable for 1 day.

annotations.description:
The pending sample rate of Prometheus remote storage is above 40% for the last 15 minutes.
This means that more than 40% of samples are waiting to be sent to remote storage, which may indicate
a bottleneck or issue with the remote write endpoint, network connectivity, or Prometheus performance.
If this condition persists, it could lead to increased memory usage and potential data loss if the buffer overflows.
Investigate the health and performance of the remote storage endpoint, network latency, and Prometheus resource utilization.
annotations.info:
The pending sample rate of Prometheus remote storage is above 40% for the last 15 minutes.
This means that more than 40% of samples are waiting to be sent to remote storage, which may indicate
a bottleneck or issue with the remote write endpoint, network connectivity, or Prometheus performance.
If this condition persists, it could lead to increased memory usage and potential data loss if the buffer overflows.
Investigate the health and performance of the remote storage endpoint, network latency, and Prometheus resource utilization.
annotations.summary: Prometheus pending sample rate is above 40%.
annotations.title: Prometheus pending sample rate is above 40%.

annotations.description:
The failed sample rate for Prometheus remote storage has exceeded 10% over the past 15 minutes.
This indicates that more than 10% of samples are not being successfully sent to remote storage, which could be caused by
issues with the remote write endpoint, network instability, or Prometheus resource constraints.
Persistent failures may result in increased memory usage and potential data loss if the buffer overflows.
Please check the health and performance of the remote storage endpoint, network connectivity, and Prometheus resource utilization.
annotations.info:
The failed sample rate for Prometheus remote storage has exceeded 10% over the past 15 minutes.
This indicates that more than 10% of samples are not being successfully sent to remote storage, which could be caused by
issues with the remote write endpoint, network instability, or Prometheus resource constraints.
Persistent failures may result in increased memory usage and potential data loss if the buffer overflows.
Please check the health and performance of the remote storage endpoint, network connectivity, and Prometheus resource utilization.
annotations.summary: Prometheus failed sample rate to remote storage is above 10%.
annotations.title: Prometheus failed sample rate to remote storage is above 10%.

annotations.description: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} failed to send {{ printf "%.1f" $value }}% of the samples to {{ $labels.remote_name}}:{{ $labels.url }}
annotations.info: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} failed to send {{ printf "%.1f" $value }}% of the samples to {{ $labels.remote_name}}:{{ $labels.url }}
annotations.summary: Prometheus fails to send samples to remote storage.
annotations.title: Prometheus fails to send samples to remote storage.

annotations.description: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} is not ingesting samples.
annotations.info: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} is not ingesting samples.
annotations.summary: Prometheus is not ingesting samples.
annotations.title: Prometheus is not ingesting samples.

rules.expression: (sum without (type) (rate(prometheus_tsdb_head_samples_appended_total{job="prometheus-prometheus",namespace="prometheus"}[5m])) <= 0 and (sum without (scrape_job) (prometheus_target_metadata_cache_entries{job="prometheus-prometheus",namespace="prometheus"}) > 0 or sum without (rule_group) (prometheus_rule_group_rules{job="prometheus-prometheus",namespace="prometheus"}) > 0))

annotations.description: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} has failed to reload its configuration.
annotations.info: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} has failed to reload its configuration.
annotations.summary: Failed Prometheus configuration reload.
annotations.title: Failed Prometheus configuration reload.

annotations.description: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} has failed to evaluate {{ printf "%.0f" $value }} rules in the last 5m.
annotations.info: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} has failed to evaluate {{ printf "%.0f" $value }} rules in the last 5m.
annotations.summary: Prometheus is failing rule evaluations.
annotations.title: Prometheus is failing rule evaluations.

annotations.description: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} has failed {{ printf "%.0f" $value }} scrapes in the last 5m because some targets exceeded the configured sample_limit.
annotations.info: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} has failed {{ printf "%.0f" $value }} scrapes in the last 5m because some targets exceeded the configured sample_limit.
annotations.summary: Prometheus has failed scrapes that have exceeded the configured sample limit.
annotations.title: Prometheus has failed scrapes that have exceeded the configured sample limit.

annotations.description: Prometheus operator in {{ $labels.namespace }} namespace isn't ready to reconcile {{ $labels.controller }} resources.
annotations.info: Prometheus operator in {{ $labels.namespace }} namespace isn't ready to reconcile {{ $labels.controller }} resources.
annotations.summary: Prometheus operator not ready
annotations.title: Prometheus operator not ready

annotations.description: Prometheus operator in {{ $labels.namespace }} namespace rejected {{ printf "%0.0f" $value }} {{ $labels.controller }}/{{ $labels.resource }} resources.
annotations.info: Prometheus operator in {{ $labels.namespace }} namespace rejected {{ printf "%0.0f" $value }} {{ $labels.controller }}/{{ $labels.resource }} resources.
annotations.summary: Resources rejected by Prometheus operator
annotations.title: Resources rejected by Prometheus operator

annotations.description: Prometheus scrape for envoy-stats job in namespace mise is failing or missing.
annotations.info: Prometheus scrape for envoy-stats job in namespace mise is failing or missing.
annotations.summary: Envoy scrape target down for namespace=mise
annotations.title: Envoy scrape target down for namespace=mise

rules.expression: group by (cluster) (up{job="kube-state-metrics", cluster=~".*-svc(-[0-9]+)?$"}) unless on(cluster) group by (cluster) (up{endpoint="http-envoy-prom", container="istio-proxy", namespace="mise"} == 1)

annotations.description: The 95th percentile of frontend request latency has exceeded 5 seconds over the past hour.
annotations.info: The 95th percentile of frontend request latency has exceeded 5 seconds over the past hour.
annotations.summary: Frontend latency is high: 95th percentile exceeds 5 seconds
annotations.title: Frontend latency is high: 95th percentile exceeds 5 seconds

annotations.summary: High Frontend audit log error rate.
annotations.title: High Frontend audit log error rate.

annotations.description: The frontend failed to connect to the audit server and is running with a no-op audit client. No audit logs are being sent.

annotations.description: Audit log error rate is above 5% for the last hour. Current value: {{ $value | humanizePercentage }}.

annotations.summary: High Admin API audit log error rate.
annotations.title: High Admin API audit log error rate.

annotations.description: The admin API failed to connect to the audit server and is running with a no-op audit client. No audit logs are being sent.
annotations.info: The admin API failed to connect to the audit server and is running with a no-op audit client. No audit logs are being sent.
annotations.summary: Admin API audit log connection is degraded.

annotations.description:
Arobit forwarder has not been reachable for the past 15 minutes.

annotations.summary: Arobit forwarder is unreachable for 15 minutes.

rules.expression: group by (cluster) (up{job="kube-state-metrics"}) unless on(cluster) group by (cluster) (up{job="arobit-forwarder",namespace="arobit"} == 1)

rules.expression: sum by (cluster, namespace, pod, container) (  irate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{job="cadvisor", image!=""}[5m])) * on (cluster, namespace, pod) group_left(node) topk by (cluster, namespace, pod) (  1, max by(cluster, namespace, pod, node) (kube_pod_info{node!=""}))
container_memory_working_set_bytes{job="cadvisor", image!=""}* on (namespace, pod) group_left(node) topk by(namespace, pod) (1,  max by(namespace, pod, node) (kube_pod_info{node!=""}))
container_memory_rss{job="cadvisor", image!=""}* on (namespace, pod) group_left(node) topk by(namespace, pod) (1,  max by(namespace, pod, node) (kube_pod_info{node!=""}))
container_memory_cache{job="cadvisor", image!=""}* on (namespace, pod) group_left(node) topk by(namespace, pod) (1,  max by(namespace, pod, node) (kube_pod_info{node!=""}))
container_memory_swap{job="cadvisor", image!=""}* on (namespace, pod) group_left(node) topk by(namespace, pod) (1,  max by(namespace, pod, node) (kube_pod_info{node!=""}))

kube_pod_container_resource_requests{resource="memory",job="kube-state-metrics"}  * on (namespace, pod, cluster)group_left() max by (namespace, pod, cluster) (  (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1))

sum by (namespace, cluster) (    sum by (namespace, pod, cluster) (        max by (namespace, pod, container, cluster) (          kube_pod_container_resource_requests{resource="memory",job="kube-state-metrics"}        ) * on(namespace, pod, cluster) group_left() max by (namespace, pod, cluster) (          kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1        )    ))

kube_pod_container_resource_requests{resource="cpu",job="kube-state-metrics"}  * on (namespace, pod, cluster)group_left() max by (namespace, pod, cluster) (  (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1))

sum by (namespace, cluster) (    sum by (namespace, pod, cluster) (        max by (namespace, pod, container, cluster) (          kube_pod_container_resource_requests{resource="cpu",job="kube-state-metrics"}        ) * on(namespace, pod, cluster) group_left() max by (namespace, pod, cluster) (          kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1        )    ))

kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource="memory",job="kube-state-metrics"}  * on (namespace, pod, cluster)group_left() max by (namespace, pod, cluster) (  (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1))

sum by (namespace, cluster) (    sum by (namespace, pod, cluster) (        max by (namespace, pod, container, cluster) (          kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource="memory",job="kube-state-metrics"}        ) * on(namespace, pod, cluster) group_left() max by (namespace, pod, cluster) (          kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1        )    ))

kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource="cpu",job="kube-state-metrics"}  * on (namespace, pod, cluster)group_left() max by (namespace, pod, cluster) ( (kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1) )

sum by (namespace, cluster) (    sum by (namespace, pod, cluster) (        max by (namespace, pod, container, cluster) (          kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource="cpu",job="kube-state-metrics"}        ) * on(namespace, pod, cluster) group_left() max by (namespace, pod, cluster) (          kube_pod_status_phase{phase=~"Pending|Running"} == 1        )    ))

max by (cluster, namespace, workload, pod) (  label_replace(    label_replace(      kube_pod_owner{job="kube-state-metrics", owner_kind="ReplicaSet"},      "replicaset", "$1", "owner_name", "(.*)"    ) * on(replicaset, namespace) group_left(owner_name) topk by(replicaset, namespace) (      1, max by (replicaset, namespace, owner_name) (        kube_replicaset_owner{job="kube-state-metrics"}      )    ),    "workload", "$1", "owner_name", "(.*)"  ))
max by (cluster, namespace, workload, pod) (  label_replace(    kube_pod_owner{job="kube-state-metrics", owner_kind="DaemonSet"},    "workload", "$1", "owner_name", "(.*)"  ))
max by (cluster, namespace, workload, pod) (  label_replace(    kube_pod_owner{job="kube-state-metrics", owner_kind="StatefulSet"},    "workload", "$1", "owner_name", "(.*)"  ))
max by (cluster, namespace, workload, pod) (  label_replace(    kube_pod_owner{job="kube-state-metrics", owner_kind="Job"},    "workload", "$1", "owner_name", "(.*)"  ))

sum(  node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes{job="node"} or  (    node_memory_Buffers_bytes{job="node"} +    node_memory_Cached_bytes{job="node"} +    node_memory_MemFree_bytes{job="node"} +    node_memory_Slab_bytes{job="node"}  )) by (cluster)

1 - (  (    node_memory_MemAvailable_bytes{job="node"}    or    (      node_memory_Buffers_bytes{job="node"}      +      node_memory_Cached_bytes{job="node"}      +      node_memory_MemFree_bytes{job="node"}      +      node_memory_Slab_bytes{job="node"}    )  )/  node_memory_MemTotal_bytes{job="node"})

metadata.description: The Azure resource ID of the Azure Monitor Workspace (stores prometheus metrics for services/aks level metrics)

annotations.description: Cluster {{ $labels.cluster }} has overcommitted memory resource requests for Pods by {{ $value | humanize }} bytes and cannot tolerate node failure.
annotations.info: Cluster {{ $labels.cluster }} has overcommitted memory resource requests for Pods by {{ $value | humanize }} bytes and cannot tolerate node failure.
annotations.summary: Cluster has overcommitted memory resource requests.
annotations.title: Cluster has overcommitted memory resource requests.

rules.expression: sum(namespace_memory:kube_pod_container_resource_requests:sum{}) by (cluster) - (sum(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="memory", job="kube-state-metrics"}) by (cluster) - max(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="memory", job="kube-state-metrics"}) by (cluster)) > 0 and (sum(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="memory", job="kube-state-metrics"}) by (cluster) - max(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="memory", job="kube-state-metrics"}) by (cluster)) > 0

annotations.description: Cluster {{ $labels.cluster }}  has overcommitted CPU resource requests for Namespaces.
annotations.info: Cluster {{ $labels.cluster }}  has overcommitted CPU resource requests for Namespaces.
annotations.summary: Cluster has overcommitted CPU resource requests.
annotations.title: Cluster has overcommitted CPU resource requests.

rules.expression: sum(min without(resource) (kube_resourcequota{job="kube-state-metrics", type="hard", resource=~"(cpu|requests.cpu)"})) by (cluster) / sum(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="cpu", job="kube-state-metrics"}) by (cluster) > 1.5

annotations.description: Cluster {{ $labels.cluster }}  has overcommitted memory resource requests for Namespaces.
annotations.info: Cluster {{ $labels.cluster }}  has overcommitted memory resource requests for Namespaces.
annotations.summary: Cluster has overcommitted memory resource requests.
annotations.title: Cluster has overcommitted memory resource requests.

rules.expression: sum(min without(resource) (kube_resourcequota{job="kube-state-metrics", type="hard", resource=~"(memory|requests.memory)"})) by (cluster) / sum(kube_node_status_allocatable{resource="memory", job="kube-state-metrics"}) by (cluster) > 1.5

annotations.description: Namespace {{ $labels.namespace }} is using {{ $value | humanizePercentage }} of its {{ $labels.resource }} quota.
annotations.info: Namespace {{ $labels.namespace }} is using {{ $value | humanizePercentage }} of its {{ $labels.resource }} quota.

annotations.description: There are {{ $value }} different semantic versions of Kubernetes components running.

annotations.description: Kubernetes API server client '{{ $labels.job }}/{{ $labels.instance }}' is experiencing {{ $value | humanizePercentage }} errors.'
annotations.info: Kubernetes API server client '{{ $labels.job }}/{{ $labels.instance }}' is experiencing {{ $value | humanizePercentage }} errors.'
annotations.summary: Kubernetes API server client is experiencing errors.
annotations.title: Kubernetes API server client is experiencing errors.

rules.expression: (sum(rate(rest_client_requests_total{job="controlplane-apiserver",code=~"5.."}[5m])) by (cluster, instance, job, namespace) / sum(rate(rest_client_requests_total{job="controlplane-apiserver"}[5m])) by (cluster, instance, job, namespace)) > 0.01

annotations.description: The API server is burning too much error budget.
annotations.info: The API server is burning too much error budget.
annotations.summary: The API server is burning too much error budget.
annotations.title: The API server is burning too much error budget.

annotations.description: The API server is burning too much error budget.

annotations.summary: The API server is burning too much error budget.

annotations.description: A client certificate used to authenticate to kubernetes apiserver is expiring in less than 7.0 days.
annotations.info: A client certificate used to authenticate to kubernetes apiserver is expiring in less than 7.0 days.
annotations.summary: Client certificate is about to expire.
annotations.title: Client certificate is about to expire.

rules.expression: apiserver_client_certificate_expiration_seconds_count{job="controlplane-apiserver"} > 0 and on(job) histogram_quantile(0.01, sum by (job, le) (rate(apiserver_client_certificate_expiration_seconds_bucket{job="controlplane-apiserver"}[5m]))) < 604800

annotations.description: A client certificate used to authenticate to kubernetes apiserver is expiring in less than 24.0 hours.
annotations.info: A client certificate used to authenticate to kubernetes apiserver is expiring in less than 24.0 hours.
annotations.summary: Client certificate is about to expire.
annotations.title: Client certificate is about to expire.

rules.expression: apiserver_client_certificate_expiration_seconds_count{job="controlplane-apiserver"} > 0 and on(job) histogram_quantile(0.01, sum by (job, le) (rate(apiserver_client_certificate_expiration_seconds_bucket{job="controlplane-apiserver"}[5m]))) < 86400

annotations.title: Node is unreachable.

annotations.description: Kubelet '{{ $labels.node }}' is running at {{ $value | humanizePercentage }} of its Pod capacity.
annotations.info: Kubelet '{{ $labels.node }}' is running at {{ $value | humanizePercentage }} of its Pod capacity.
annotations.summary: Kubelet is running at capacity.
annotations.title: Kubelet is running at capacity.

rules.expression: count by(cluster, node) ( (kube_pod_status_phase{job="kube-state-metrics",phase="Running"} == 1) * on(instance,pod,namespace,cluster) group_left(node) topk by(instance,pod,namespace,cluster) (1, kube_pod_info{job="kube-state-metrics"}) ) / max by(cluster, node) ( kube_node_status_capacity{job="kube-state-metrics",resource="pods"} != 1 ) > 0.95

annotations.description: The readiness status of node {{ $labels.node }} has changed {{ $value }} times in the last 15 minutes.
annotations.info: The readiness status of node {{ $labels.node }} has changed {{ $value }} times in the last 15 minutes.
annotations.summary: Node readiness status is flapping.
annotations.title: Node readiness status is flapping.

annotations.description: The Kubelet Pod Lifecycle Event Generator has a 99th percentile duration of {{ $value }} seconds on node {{ $labels.node }}.
annotations.info: The Kubelet Pod Lifecycle Event Generator has a 99th percentile duration of {{ $value }} seconds on node {{ $labels.node }}.
annotations.summary: Kubelet Pod Lifecycle Event Generator is taking too long to relist.
annotations.title: Kubelet Pod Lifecycle Event Generator is taking too long to relist.

annotations.description: Kubelet Pod startup 99th percentile latency is {{ $value }} seconds on node {{ $labels.node }}.
annotations.info: Kubelet Pod startup 99th percentile latency is {{ $value }} seconds on node {{ $labels.node }}.
annotations.summary: Kubelet Pod startup latency is too high.
annotations.title: Kubelet Pod startup latency is too high.

rules.expression: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(kubelet_pod_worker_duration_seconds_bucket{job="kubelet", metrics_path="/metrics"}[5m])) by (cluster, instance, le)) * on(cluster, instance) group_left(node) kubelet_node_name{job="kubelet", metrics_path="/metrics"} > 60

annotations.description: Client certificate for Kubelet on node {{ $labels.node }} expires in {{ $value | humanizeDuration }}.
annotations.info: Client certificate for Kubelet on node {{ $labels.node }} expires in {{ $value | humanizeDuration }}.

annotations.info: Kubelet has disappeared from Prometheus target discovery.

annotations.description:
Prometheus has not been reachable for the past 5 minutes.
This may indicate that the Prometheus server is down, unreachable due to network issues, or experiencing a crash loop.
Check the status of the Prometheus pods, service endpoints, and network connectivity.
annotations.info:
Prometheus has not been reachable for the past 5 minutes.
This may indicate that the Prometheus server is down, unreachable due to network issues, or experiencing a crash loop.
Check the status of the Prometheus pods, service endpoints, and network connectivity.
annotations.summary: Prometheus is unreachable for 5 minutes.
annotations.title: Prometheus is unreachable for 5 minutes.

rules.expression: group by (cluster) (up{job="kube-state-metrics"}) unless on(cluster) group by (cluster) (up{job="prometheus/prometheus",namespace="prometheus"} == 1)

annotations.description:
Prometheus has been unreachable for more than 5% of the time over the past 24 hours.
This may indicate that the Prometheus server is down, experiencing network issues, or stuck in a crash loop.
Please check the status of the Prometheus pods, service endpoints, and network connectivity.
annotations.info:
Prometheus has been unreachable for more than 5% of the time over the past 24 hours.
This may indicate that the Prometheus server is down, experiencing network issues, or stuck in a crash loop.
Please check the status of the Prometheus pods, service endpoints, and network connectivity.
annotations.summary: Prometheus is unreachable for 1 day.
annotations.title: Prometheus is unreachable for 1 day.

annotations.description:
The pending sample rate of Prometheus remote storage is above 40% for the last 15 minutes.
This means that more than 40% of samples are waiting to be sent to remote storage, which may indicate
a bottleneck or issue with the remote write endpoint, network connectivity, or Prometheus performance.
If this condition persists, it could lead to increased memory usage and potential data loss if the buffer overflows.
Investigate the health and performance of the remote storage endpoint, network latency, and Prometheus resource utilization.
annotations.info:
The pending sample rate of Prometheus remote storage is above 40% for the last 15 minutes.
This means that more than 40% of samples are waiting to be sent to remote storage, which may indicate
a bottleneck or issue with the remote write endpoint, network connectivity, or Prometheus performance.
If this condition persists, it could lead to increased memory usage and potential data loss if the buffer overflows.
Investigate the health and performance of the remote storage endpoint, network latency, and Prometheus resource utilization.
annotations.summary: Prometheus pending sample rate is above 40%.
annotations.title: Prometheus pending sample rate is above 40%.

annotations.description:
The failed sample rate for Prometheus remote storage has exceeded 10% over the past 15 minutes.
This indicates that more than 10% of samples are not being successfully sent to remote storage, which could be caused by
issues with the remote write endpoint, network instability, or Prometheus resource constraints.
Persistent failures may result in increased memory usage and potential data loss if the buffer overflows.
Please check the health and performance of the remote storage endpoint, network connectivity, and Prometheus resource utilization.
annotations.info:
The failed sample rate for Prometheus remote storage has exceeded 10% over the past 15 minutes.
This indicates that more than 10% of samples are not being successfully sent to remote storage, which could be caused by
issues with the remote write endpoint, network instability, or Prometheus resource constraints.
Persistent failures may result in increased memory usage and potential data loss if the buffer overflows.
Please check the health and performance of the remote storage endpoint, network connectivity, and Prometheus resource utilization.
annotations.summary: Prometheus failed sample rate to remote storage is above 10%.
annotations.title: Prometheus failed sample rate to remote storage is above 10%.

annotations.description: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} failed to send {{ printf "%.1f" $value }}% of the samples to {{ $labels.remote_name}}:{{ $labels.url }}
annotations.info: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} failed to send {{ printf "%.1f" $value }}% of the samples to {{ $labels.remote_name}}:{{ $labels.url }}
annotations.summary: Prometheus fails to send samples to remote storage.
annotations.title: Prometheus fails to send samples to remote storage.

annotations.description: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} is not ingesting samples.
annotations.info: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} is not ingesting samples.
annotations.summary: Prometheus is not ingesting samples.
annotations.title: Prometheus is not ingesting samples.

rules.expression: (sum without (type) (rate(prometheus_tsdb_head_samples_appended_total{job="prometheus-prometheus",namespace="prometheus"}[5m])) <= 0 and (sum without (scrape_job) (prometheus_target_metadata_cache_entries{job="prometheus-prometheus",namespace="prometheus"}) > 0 or sum without (rule_group) (prometheus_rule_group_rules{job="prometheus-prometheus",namespace="prometheus"}) > 0))

annotations.description: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} has failed to reload its configuration.
annotations.info: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} has failed to reload its configuration.
annotations.summary: Failed Prometheus configuration reload.
annotations.title: Failed Prometheus configuration reload.

annotations.description: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} has failed to evaluate {{ printf "%.0f" $value }} rules in the last 5m.
annotations.info: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} has failed to evaluate {{ printf "%.0f" $value }} rules in the last 5m.
annotations.summary: Prometheus is failing rule evaluations.
annotations.title: Prometheus is failing rule evaluations.

annotations.description: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} has failed {{ printf "%.0f" $value }} scrapes in the last 5m because some targets exceeded the configured sample_limit.
annotations.info: Prometheus {{$labels.namespace}}/{{$labels.pod}} has failed {{ printf "%.0f" $value }} scrapes in the last 5m because some targets exceeded the configured sample_limit.
annotations.summary: Prometheus has failed scrapes that have exceeded the configured sample limit.
annotations.title: Prometheus has failed scrapes that have exceeded the configured sample limit.

annotations.description: Prometheus operator in {{ $labels.namespace }} namespace isn't ready to reconcile {{ $labels.controller }} resources.
annotations.info: Prometheus operator in {{ $labels.namespace }} namespace isn't ready to reconcile {{ $labels.controller }} resources.
annotations.summary: Prometheus operator not ready
annotations.title: Prometheus operator not ready

annotations.description: Prometheus operator in {{ $labels.namespace }} namespace rejected {{ printf "%0.0f" $value }} {{ $labels.controller }}/{{ $labels.resource }} resources.
annotations.info: Prometheus operator in {{ $labels.namespace }} namespace rejected {{ printf "%0.0f" $value }} {{ $labels.controller }}/{{ $labels.resource }} resources.
annotations.summary: Resources rejected by Prometheus operator
annotations.title: Resources rejected by Prometheus operator

annotations.description: Prometheus scrape for envoy-stats job in namespace mise is failing or missing.
annotations.info: Prometheus scrape for envoy-stats job in namespace mise is failing or missing.
annotations.summary: Envoy scrape target down for namespace=mise
annotations.title: Envoy scrape target down for namespace=mise

rules.expression: group by (cluster) (up{job="kube-state-metrics", cluster=~".*-svc(-[0-9]+)?$"}) unless on(cluster) group by (cluster) (up{endpoint="http-envoy-prom", container="istio-proxy", namespace="mise"} == 1)

annotations.description: Cluster credential for cluster {{ $labels.cluster }} is expiring in less than 30 days.
annotations.info: Cluster credential for cluster {{ $labels.cluster }} is expiring in less than 30 days.
annotations.summary: Cluster credential expiring in less than 30 days
annotations.title: Cluster credential expiring in less than 30 days
